arts.ttl: Man Utd 'panicked' over Fernandes transfer demand
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was ready to jump ship in the summer, but 'the club panicked and gave him a massive new deal,' according to a report. The Red Devils have been in turmoil most years since Sir Alex Ferguson's retirement and it has been no different under Erik ten Hag. After a promising first season in charge, things quickly turned sour last term, with Man Utd slumping to their worst-ever Premier League finish.

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane new role confirmed as statement released after Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Raphael Varane, who left Manchester United in the summer, has a new role after retiring from professional football

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brentford LIVE early team news, kick-off time and how to watch
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates and analysis from Old Trafford as Man United take on Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag offers hint at Man United's Kobbie Mainoo replacement vs Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without the services of Kobbie Mainoo for the foreseeable future after he suffered a muscular issue prior to the international break

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Real Madrid regret Mbappe signing; Man Utd prepare January bid for De Jong
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have joined Liverpool in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen centre-back Jonathan Tah, whose contract expires in the summer. Erik ten Hag wants Manchester United to sign Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong in the January transfer window, assuming he remains in charge.

arts.ttl: I am a Liverpool icon but how Man United have treated Sir Alex Ferguson is disgraceful
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe informed Sir Alex Ferguson this week that his ambassadorial job will come to an end in the summer

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Brentford to Old Trafford in the Premier League this weekend. Erik ten Hag’s team will be aiming to get their season back on track after a torrid start to the campaign. The Red Devils are 14th in the Premier League table after their worst start to a campaign since 1989/90. arts.ttl: Don Hutchison publicly hits out at Manchester United's Erik ten Hag for what he's now done

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes was 'ready to leave Man United' until Ineos intervention promoted major U-turn
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes is one of the club's key players and first name on the teamsheet for Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd in contact with Man City’s dream Guardiola heir to replace Ten Hag
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, the Red Devils have already made contact with Sporting CP boss Ruben Amorim, who has been hailed as a natural heir to Guardiola at City. Manchester United are already in contact with numerous potential replacements for manager Erik ten Hag – but now the Red Devils are seeking to steal a sensational march on rivals Manchester City in the race for a coach lined up as Pep Guardiola’s successor.
